mapper.select: select id from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('SUCCESS','PARTIAL_FAILED') and finished_at is not null and finished_at < #{cutoff} order by id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into archive.job_instance_archive select * from batch.job_instance where id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_partition_archive select * from batch.job_partition where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_task_archive select * from batch.job_task where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_step_instance_archive select * from batch.job_step_instance where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.pipeline_instance_archive select * from batch.pipeline_instance where related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.pipeline_step_run_archive select * from batch.pipeline_step_run where pipeline_instance_id in ( select id from batch.pipeline_instance where related_job_instance_id in #{id} ) on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.file_dispatch_record_archive select * from batch.file_dispatch_record where pipeline_instance_id in ( select id from batch.pipeline_instance where related_job_instance_id in #{id} ) on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.workflow_run_archive select * from batch.workflow_run where related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing

insert into archive.workflow_node_run_archive select * from batch.workflow_node_run where workflow_run_id in ( select id from batch.workflow_run where related_job_instance_id in #{id} ) on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_execution_log_archive select * from batch.job_execution_log where job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.compensation_command_archive select * from batch.compensation_command where related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
